---
title: "Words"
---

::: {.callout-tip}
# Learning Goals: Words
1. Be able to define the following terms: *lexical item*, *morpheme*, *supramodal*
1. Identify the stages involved in processing spoken and written words
1. Identify the major brain regions involved in processing words
1. Describe evidence for the following claim: There is a shared lexical-semantic processing system for spoken, signed, and written words
1. Name one area of current controversy
:::


| Date | Topic | Reading | Slides | Poll |
| -- | -- | -- | -- | -- |
| Thurs 9/24 | Words | SGN Ch. 5: *Activating Words* | <span class="blue-badge">↗</span>| |
| Tues 9/29 | Time course |  Marinkovic et al. (2003) | | | 

<!-- Mentimeter>
(deficit in conceptual processing, in lexical items, phonology)

<!-- Skip 
- SGN Ch. 6: *Representing Meaning*
- Huth et al. (2016)
-->
